_comment: Authoritative Ollama model catalog. Edited via PR; mChatAI apps refresh this on launch via MchataisourceCacheService. Do not duplicate this content into platform binaries (CLAUDE.md ABSOLUTE RULE #1). The bundled-snapshot copy in mChatAI.app/Resources/mchatai-source-snapshot/harness/ollama-catalog.json is a frozen offline first-launch fallback only.

families.name: Gemma
families.author: Google
families.description: Google's open models. Gemma 3 adds multimodal and long context.

families.name: Qwen
families.author: Alibaba
families.description: Strong reasoning and coding. Qwen 3 is the latest generation.

families.name: Llama
families.author: Meta
families.description: Meta's open foundation models. Llama 3.3 and Llama 4 available.

families.name: Mistral
families.author: Mistral AI
families.description: Efficient European models, strong at multilingual tasks.

families.name: DeepSeek
families.author: DeepSeek
families.description: Reasoning-focused models. DeepSeek R1 for chain-of-thought.

families.name: Phi
families.author: Microsoft
families.description: Small but capable. Great for edge deployment.

families.name: Embeddings
families.author: Various
families.description: Text embedding models for RAG and search.

families.name: Moondream
families.author: Vikhyat
families.description: Tiny but fast vision model. Pre-screens screenshots before deeper eval.

models.name: gemma3:1b
models.description: Tiny Gemma 3 — runs on almost anything. Great for quick tests.

models.name: gemma3:4b
models.description: Multimodal (vision + text), 128K context. Excellent quality for size.

models.name: gemma3:12b
models.description: Multimodal with strong reasoning. 128K context window.

models.name: gemma3:27b
models.description: Top Gemma 3 model. Multimodal, 128K context, best quality in family.

models.name: gemma2:2b
models.description: Previous generation — smaller Gemma 2. Still solid for chat.

models.name: gemma2:9b
models.description: Gemma 2 mid-tier. Good instruction following.

models.name: qwen3:0.6b
models.description: Ultra-cheap routing. Binary intent detection. Runs on any machine.

models.name: qwen3:1.7b
models.description: Solid intent detection and correction classification. Minimum viable routing model.

models.name: qwen3:4b
models.description: Sweet spot for small devices. #1 SLM for classification tasks. Thinking mode toggle.

models.name: qwen3:8b
models.description: Balanced Qwen 3. Strong reasoning and coding.

models.name: qwen3:14b
models.description: Higher capability Qwen 3. Near cloud quality.

models.name: qwen3:32b
models.description: Top dense Qwen 3 model. Excellent reasoning.

models.name: qwen3-vl:4b
models.description: Vision + text with 256K context. Local screenshot evaluation for 8 GB machines.

models.name: qwen3-vl:8b
models.description: Best local vision model. UI/OCR/screenshot evaluation. Recommended for 16 GB+ machines.

models.name: qwen2.5vl:7b
models.description: Mature vision model. Outperforms GPT-4o-mini on UI/document tasks.

models.name: qwen2.5:7b
models.description: Qwen 2.5 flagship. Still a strong choice.

models.name: qwen2.5-coder:7b
models.description: Code-specialized Qwen 2.5. Excellent for dev tasks.

models.name: qwen2.5-coder:32b
models.description: Best open coding model. Near Claude Sonnet for code.

models.name: llama3.3:70b
models.description: Meta's 70B competing with much larger models. Heavy but great.

models.name: llama3.2:1b
models.description: Tiny Llama for edge devices. Decent for basic chat.

models.name: llama3.2:3b
models.description: Compact Llama. Solid general-purpose small model.

models.name: llama3.2-vision:11b
models.description: Multimodal — can see images. 11B variant.

models.name: llama3.1:8b
models.description: Meta's workhorse. Strong all-around capability.

models.name: llama3.1:70b
models.description: Previous flagship. Still excellent.

models.name: mistral:7b
models.description: The original efficient model. Fast and reliable.

models.name: mistral-nemo:12b
models.description: 12B collab with NVIDIA. 128K context, strong multilingual.

models.name: mistral-small:24b
models.description: Latest small — beats many larger models on benchmarks.

models.name: deepseek-r1:1.5b
models.description: Tiny reasoning model. Shows chain-of-thought.

models.name: deepseek-r1:7b
models.description: Reasoning-focused. Distilled from the full R1.

models.name: deepseek-r1:14b
models.description: Larger distilled R1. Excellent at math and reasoning.

models.name: deepseek-r1:32b
models.description: Top distilled R1. Competes with o1-mini on reasoning.

models.name: phi4:14b
models.description: Microsoft's latest. Punches above its weight class.

models.name: phi4-mini:3.8b
models.description: Compact Phi-4. Strong reasoning (MMLU 67.3%). Good for correction classification.

models.name: phi3.5:3.8b
models.description: Small but mighty. Great for constrained environments.

models.name: granite3.1-dense:8b
models.description: IBM enterprise model with 128K context.

models.name: codellama:7b
models.description: Meta's code specialist. Older but still useful.

models.name: codellama:13b
models.description: Mid-size code model. Consider Qwen 2.5 Coder instead.

models.name: nomic-embed-text
models.description: High-quality text embeddings for RAG and search.

models.name: mxbai-embed-large
models.description: State-of-the-art open embedding model.

models.name: moondream:latest
models.description: Fastest vision model. Binary screenshot pre-screening (crash? blank screen?) before full vision eval.

starterSetRules._note: <8 GB: tiny routing + tiny vision fallback
